creator: fzipitria@perceptyx.com
text:
Created attachment 214161
Makefile patch with updated nginx version.

Now that nginx version was bumped up to 1.18.0, we need to update the module to match it.

You will get this otherwise:

nginx: [emerg] module "/usr/local/libexec/nginx/ngx_http_modsecurity_module.so" version 1016001 instead of 1018000 in /usr/local/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:7
